prose:
**TEMPO frontier‐orbital gap** — DFT, B3LYP/def2‐TZVP (no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (doublet, UKS).  
Geometry: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates (`tempo.xyz`); single‐point calculation — no re-optimization at DFT (`DFT//provided xyz`).  
SCF converged in 12 cycles; no warnings reported.

Headline result (Koopmans orbital gap):
• HOMO = −6.3375439 eV  
• LUMO = −2.4651235 eV  
⇒ HOMO–LUMO gap = **3.8724203 eV**

Live run used chemkit skill `frontier-orbitals` with the command:
`chemkit frontier-orbitals --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 2 tempo.xyz`
Output JSON written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmptbuvd1_n/live.json`; SCF/optimizer log streamed live to the companion `.out` file in the same directory.

No engine warnings were emitted; integrity check returned `status: ok`, `trustworthy: true`. The result is therefore reported as computed.
